sentences.arabic: شَهِدَ قِطَاعُ السِّيَاحَةِ فِي البِلَادِ نُمُوًّا كَبِيرًا خِلَالَ الأَشْهُرِ المَاضِيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Turistički sektor u zemlji zabilježio je značajan rast tokom proteklih mjeseci.
sentences.translationEn: The tourism sector in the country witnessed significant growth during the past months.

sentences.arabic: زَارَ مَلَايِينُ السُّيَّاحِ المَوَاقِعَ الأَثَرِيَّةَ وَالشَّوَاطِئَ الجَمِيلَةَ.
sentences.translation: Milioni turista posjetili su arheološka nalazišta i prelijepe plaže.
sentences.translationEn: Millions of tourists visited archaeological sites and beautiful beaches.

sentences.arabic: أَدَّى هَذَا النَّشَاطُ إِلَى خَلْقِ فُرَصِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ لِلشَّبَابِ.
sentences.translation: Ova aktivnost dovela je do stvaranja novih radnih mjesta za mlade ljude.
sentences.translationEn: This activity led to the creation of new job opportunities for young people.

sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ الفَنَادِقُ الآنَ بِكَامِلِ طَاقَتِهَا لِاسْتِقْبَالِ الزُّوَّارِ مِنَ الخَارِجِ.
sentences.translation: Hoteli sada rade punim kapacitetom kako bi primili posjetioce iz inostranstva.
sentences.translationEn: Hotels are now operating at full capacity to receive visitors from abroad.

sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ هَذَا النَّجَاحُ خَطْوَةً مُهِمَّةً لِدَعْمِ الِاقْتِصَادِ الوَطَنِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj uspjeh se smatra važnim korakom za podršku nacionalnoj ekonomiji.
sentences.translationEn: This success is considered an important step to support the national economy.
